root.description:
BehaviorTree.CPP node manifest for locomotion_ros2. The shared library liblocomotion_ros2_bt.so registers its nodes via BT_REGISTER_NODES and can be loaded with BT::BehaviorTreeFactory::registerFromPlugin(...), or linked directly and registered with locomotion_ros2_bt::register_locomotion_ros2_bt_nodes.
Registered nodes: - CheckWalkingReady (Condition): SUCCESS when the WalkingState on the walking_state input port reports the robot ready to walk. - ClearWalkingFault (Action): SUCCESS when the clear_succeeded input port indicates the clear-fault service call succeeded.
The locomotion_ros2_bt_recovery_node additionally registers a ROS-integrated ClearWalkingFaultService action that calls /locomotion_ros2/clear_fault directly and drives the live recovery tree (bt_xml/locomotion_ros2_recovery_live.xml).
